ai_summary: This document is an annual compliance disclosure from Chandra Shekhar Verma, Promoter & MD of ACE Integrated Solutions Limited, affirming that no new encumbrances were created on promoter shares for the year ended March 31, 2026. Crucially, the disclosure explicitly states that *none* of the significant promoter and promoter group shareholding, which represents over 73% of the company's total capital, is currently pledged or otherwise encumbered. This absence of pledged shares is a positive indicator of the promoters' financial stability and confidence in the company, enhancing investor trust and perception.
